name: Crypt of the Ancients
description: An imposing stone archway carved into the side of a hill. Faint, bluish light flickers from within.

discovery.message: You notice a curious alignment of standing stones that points toward a hidden entrance in the hillside.

entrance.text: The air inside is cold and heavy with the scent of incense. The main hall leads straight ahead, but a dusty side-passage is partially hidden by a fallen tapestry.

choices.label: Use Holy Water on the threshold to ward off evil.

main-hall-skeletons.text: As you walk down the hall, skeletal remains on the floor begin to rattle and knit themselves together!

side-passage-find.text: The passage is narrow and filled with cobwebs. You spot a tripwire connected to a heavy swinging blade.
side-passage-find.success_text: You nimbly disarm the trap and bypass the main hall entirely.
side-passage-find.failure_text: You trigger the trap! The blade swings down with a whistle.

trap-blade-damage.text: The blade slashes your side. (Took 8 Slashing Damage)

holy-threshold.text: The Holy Water sizzles on the stone. A protective barrier forms, and the restless spirits in the hall remain dormant as you pass.

grand-chamber.text: You arrive at a grand chamber with a massive stone sarcophagus. To the left is a small shrine, and to the right is a staircase leading deeper into the dark.

hall-of-whispers.text: The staircase leads into a narrow tunnel where the air vibrates with psychic energy. Whispers of your past failures echo in your mind, threatening to overwhelm your will.
hall-of-whispers.success_text: You steel your mind against the voices. Their power fades as you press forward.
hall-of-whispers.failure_text: The whispers become a deafening roar of despair. You find yourself fleeing back to the grand chamber, trembling.

hall-of-whispers-fail.text: The mental strain has taken a toll. (Took 4 Psychic Damage)

shrine-meditation.text: You feel a profound sense of peace. The spirits of the ancients bless your journey.

sarcophagus-loot.text: As you heave the lid open, a powerful Wight rises from the grave!

sarcophagus-success.text: Inside the sarcophagus, you find the treasures of a forgotten king.

crypt-shortcut.text: Past the Hall of Whispers, you find a series of well-maintained tunnels that eventually emerge far to the north.
